name: GitHub Command Center
description: Seamlessly integrate Git. Visual diffs, automatic READMEs, BOM generation, and 1-click gerber export and JLCPCB constraint setup.
description_full:
GitHub Command Center brings powerful version control and manufacturing automation directly into KiCad.

Features include:
- Visual Diff Engine: See exact graphical changes in PCB traces, components, and schematics between commits.
- Manufacturing Ready: Automatically applies JLCPCB's safest design constraints (rules) and generates 1-click production Gerber ZIPs.
- Auto-Documentation: Automatically generates and updates your project's README.md with hardware stats and BOM data.
- Smart Sync: Safely stash, switch branches, and pull remote changes in other files than KiCad PCB or Schematic files.

Requirement: Git must be installed on your system.
